get.summary: Exports booked transactions to CSV for a given period

parameters.name: accountKey
parameters.description: Key to the account you want to export booked transactions from

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Search fromDate date. Date is based on the date when the transaction was performed in Norwegian time.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Search toDate date, Date is based on the date when the transaction was performed in Norwegian time.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
"Fields to include in export. If no fields are defined, default values are set to DATE, DESCRIPTION, INTEREST_DATE, IN, OUT, TO_ACCOUNT, FROM_ACCOUNT

            - DATE: Bokføringsdato
            - DESCRIPTION: Beskrivelse av transaksjonen
            - INTEREST_DATE: Rentedato
            - IN: Innbetaling (beløp inn på konto)
            - OUT: Utbetaling (beløp ut av konto)
            - TO_ACCOUNT: Tilkonto
            - FROM_ACCOUNT: Frakonto
            - CATEGORY: Hovedkategori
            - SUBCATEGORY: Underkategori
